message:
chore(beads): close bd-1te5, bd-3h8j, bd-3pvm, bd-6wcz (audit and security fixes)

- bd-1te5: fix(quarantine) complete_recall missing RecallTriggered guard
- bd-3h8j: fix(security) length-prefix hash inputs in sdk/verifier bindings
- bd-3pvm: audit session 2 — 1 bug fixed, rest clean
- bd-6wcz: deep audit sweep of connector + supply_chain modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
